description: Lead PM for core onboarding and activation. Shipped 3 major features driving 34% lift in week-1 retention.
Owned patient scheduling and telehealth experience. Reduced no-show rate by 22% through predictive reminders.
Launched self-serve analytics dashboard for SMB customers. Grew paid conversion from trial by 18%.
Partnered with product and eng on mobile banking MVP. Defined KPIs and ran weekly experiment reviews.
